arts.ttl: Why Diogo Jota missed Liverpool training as Mohamed Salah finishes last
arts.sum: The ECHO were in attendance at Liverpool's open training session at the AXA Training Centre ahead of their Champions League clash with Bologna

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man City plans to replace Rodri could deal transfer blow to Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City are considering two main midfield targets as they weigh up whether or not to sign cover for the injured Rodri this January, with sources informing CaughtOffside that Adam Wharton of Crystal Palace and Atalanta’s Ederson are the main names they’re following. arts.ttl: Liverpool press conference LIVE - Jota and Chiesa injury news, Arne Slot and Mac Allister updates
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Rimmer, Theo Squires, Beth Lindop)

arts.ttl: Fernando Torres surprise next job update emerges after Liverpool return and Jurgen Klopp talks
arts.sum: Emerging reports indicate former Liverpool striker Fernando Torres could be set to land his first senior role in management with German side Schalke 04.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp breaks silence on next job after Liverpool exit with clear 2026 hope revealed
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp has made a telling comment relating to speculation that he will end his managerial hiatus to become Germany manager, following his Liverpool exit

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'make decision' on free agent as transfer agreed
arts.sum: Liverpool have decided against making a move for Oumar Solet, who has agreed a deal to join Serie A side Udinese in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd consider Inzaghi; Liverpool told Tchouameni is for sale
arts.sum: Even if Zubimendi is off the table, Arsenal are expected to sign a new midfielder in the summer of 2025. Liverpool are aware that Real Madrid are open to selling midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni next summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive double training boost and double blow before Bologna clash
arts.sum: Diogo Jota and Federico Chiesa are absent from Liverpool training ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash with Bologna, but Darwin Nunez and Andy Robertson take part.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot told he's 'not typical' after guiding Liverpool to top of Premier League
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Leeds striker Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink has been speaking about Arne Slot's start to life at Anfield and he's got a view on if Liverpool can win title
